AboutSection.intro:
I combine development with product thinking.
I understand user needs and translate them into solutions that
work – technically and business-wise.

specializations.title: End-to-end development
specializations.description: From UI to backend and business logic

specializations.title: Backend logic & data
specializations.description: Implementing logic and working with data and code quality

specializations.title: Business analysis
specializations.description: Understanding needs and translating them into technical solutions

AboutSection.workBio1: I design and build applications end-to-end — from frontend architecture, through <accent>API</accent> and <accent>AI</accent> integrations, to deployment. I have experience working with both complex systems and internal tools.
AboutSection.workBio2: I bridge development and UX through a background in graphic design — I see the product through the user's eyes, not just a developer's. I work primarily in <accent>React</accent>, <accent>Next.js</accent> and <accent>TypeScript</accent>, but I'm equally comfortable on the <green>backend</green> and with <green>databases</green>.
